layoutRegions.name: device-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Readiness counts for enrolled devices, healthy signals, exceptions, and blocked access paths.

layoutRegions.name: posture-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: Device inventory with owner, posture claims, attestation freshness, and compliance state.

layoutRegions.name: signal-and-policy-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Stale compliance signals, owner intent, exception windows, and rollback-safe access policy changes.

components.name: DevicePostureCard
components.purpose: Focusable enrolled device card with owner, posture evidence, attestation freshness, and compliance state.
interactions: state badge distinguishes compliant, exception, and blocked devices
posture evidence wraps without horizontal overflow

components.name: ComplianceFinding
components.purpose: Stale compliance signal finding with source device, evidence, and access policy state.
interactions: focus state is visible for keyboard review
blocked access paths remain visually distinct

components.name: AccessPolicyChange
components.purpose: Device access policy change with exception window, rollback guard, and posture probe.
interactions: rollback guidance wraps without horizontal overflow

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
